title: Origins: Glimmer
body:
# Glimmer
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/478137114d717bf5dc52985ac2c856e7162bae19.png)

**An Impact 2 origin**\
_Like an immovable force of glistening metal, these pure golden beings are rivaled by none in their ability to manipulate gold._

## Origin Showcase
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/478137114d717bf5dc52985ac2c856e7162bae19.png)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/atJ4u1t_6Wk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## List of Powers
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/478137114d717bf5dc52985ac2c856e7162bae19.png)
<details>
<summary>Treasure Trove</summary>
Your body consists of pure, solid gold, which the manipulation of makes up your abilities.
<details>
<summary>Info</summary>

The gold you use is taken from your body. As your body loses gold, it shrinks.

Your damage resistance, speed, reach, physical attack damage, and underwater sink speed vary depending on your current size.
</details>
</details>

<details>
<summary>Auric Manipulation</summary>
Manipulate your body's gold, shaping it into various forms. Some abilities release gold remains at the location they resulted at.
<details>
<summary>Info</summary>
Activate auric manipulation abilities while holding your primary key.

The list of available abilities is shown on a separate page in the origins menu.
</details>
</details>

<details>
<summary>Regenerative Force</summary>
Your body slowly regenerates any missing gold, exhausting you in the process. The regeneration effect increases the potency of your gold regeneration.
<details>
<summary>Info</summary>
Toggle your gold regeneration with your secondary key.
</details>
</details>

<details>
<summary>Gilded Diet</summary>
Non-golden foods are incompatible with your golden body, resulting in them being less satisfying. You can consume gold materials for nourishment.
<details>
<summary>Info</summary>
Eating golden foods and materials when fully satisfied will add to your body's gold, up to 1.5x your normal capacity.
</details>
</details>

<details>
<summary>Hefty Build</summary>
You cannot fly with an elytra and will sink when in water. The larger you are, the faster you sink.
<details>
<summary>Info</summary>
You do not require air to survive and are immune to fall damage.
</details>
</details>

<details>
<summary>Grating Loss</summary>
Physical damage sources scrape off some of your body’s gold. The more damage you receive, the more gold is lost.
</details>


## Dependencies
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/478137114d717bf5dc52985ac2c856e7162bae19.png)

This datapack requires the [Origins Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins)!
